parameters.name: branch
parameters.description: Branch override; defaults to the codebase's spec.defaultBranch.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Filter findings by analyzer source (e.g. NPM, OSSINDEX_ANALYZER).

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of severities to include. Allowed values: CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, INFO, UNASSIGNED. The filter is applied before the 1000-row server cap, so `truncated=true` reports that more matching findings exist than were returned.

200.description: Successful response. status='NONE' when no Dep-Track project matches the codebase+branch.

truncated.description: True when more matching findings exist than were returned (1000-row server cap).

404.description: Codebase not found or default branch missing

parameters.name: branch
parameters.description: Branch override; defaults to the codebase's spec.defaultBranch.

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of severities to include. Allowed values: CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, INFO, UNASSIGNED. When set, the portal auto-pages Dep-Track and filters across the entire project before paginating; `truncated=true` indicates the safety cap was hit and not all matches were inspected.

200.description: Successful response. status='NONE' when no Dep-Track project matches the codebase+branch.

truncated.description: True when the auto-paging safety cap fired before all components were inspected.

404.description: Codebase not found or default branch missing

issues.description: An array of issues that were responsible for the error
